text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bump into Tokai Teio as she's trudging along
somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... Why do we have another health checkup today?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look at me! I'm the picture of health! It's a total
waste of time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the checkup room is sooo cramped! And
everyone's dressed in white with this super serious
look on their face...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll sit in your office and do nothing for you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, we can't switch places, so Tokai
Teio lumbers to her checkup, sighing as she goes.
